---
title: "Classe <br> Jovem"
title-slide-attributes:
  data-background-image: florest.gif
  data-background-position: cover
format: 
  revealjs:
    menu: false
    theme: tirinha.scss
    width: 1600
    height: 900
    fontsize: 80px
self-contained: true
---

#

Lição 13: Por toda a eternidade

<center>
![](tirinha-13.png)
</center>
